repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: All five memories directly match the current opbuild error: TilingFunc using set_totalLength/set_tileLength/set_blockDim on Ca6k02677CustomTilingData, but the class has no such setter members. These memories document the same pattern for other ca6k ops (ca6k_00262, ca6k_00240, ca6k_00288, ca6k_00253, ca6k_00397) and provide the fix: assign directly to tiling data fields instead of calling set_* methods. Because the root cause and symptom are identical, injecting these memories will guide the repair to avoid setter calls.
